arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes young fan's 'dream come true' with a touching gesture - as Man United's 'humble' boss takes him for a lap around Carrington in his car
arts.sum: Amorim, who has endured a difficult start to life as Red Devils boss with three defeats on the spin, was labelled 'a humble, normal man' after making the touching gesture.

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro call and Alejandro Garnacho decision - Manchester United predicted XI vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Man United will be eyeing a return to winning ways when they face Newcastle United at Old Trafford on Monday evening.

arts.ttl: Manchester United without five stars for Newcastle test
arts.sum: Captain Bruno Fernandes will sit the game out having picked up a one-match suspension following his red card in the Boxing Day defeat at Wolves. On the injury front, Amorim is without former England and Chelsea midfielder Mason Mount, who is sidelined for several week after picking up an injury against Man City, while defender Victor Lindelof came off at half-time in the Carabao Cup defeat to Tottenham and will again miss today's game.

arts.ttl: Monday's Transfer Talk Update: Florian Wirtz, Andre Onana, Bart Verbruggen
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United squad revealed for Man United with one big addition and Howe dilemma
arts.sum: Howe is looking forward to tonight's game, and has challenged his side to take any opportunities that come their way. Eddie Howe will take a strong Newcastle United squad to Old Trafford tonight as they look to sign off 2024 with their fifth win in a row.

arts.ttl: How to watch Manchester United vs Newcastle: TV channel and live stream for Premier League today
arts.sum: Red Devils are out to end a run of three straight defeats

arts.ttl: Monday's Premier League predictions including Man United vs. Newcastle
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Premier League fixtures, including Manchester United vs. Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Man United vs Newcastle TV channel, live stream, kick off time
arts.sum: The game gets under way at 8pm tonight, Monday, December 30, at Old Traford It is one of three Premier League games today Simon Hooper is the man in the middle tonight, the third time is he taken charge of the Magpies this season, following Premier League away defeats to Chelsea and Brentford.

arts.ttl: Ruthless Newcastle have never had a better chance to pile on Man United misery
arts.sum: They have conceded 10 goals from free-kicks or corners in the league this season and 18 times in total during 2024 which is a club record and has not improved one jot on the watch of the new manager. Before this current set of matches got under way on Sunday they trailed Newcastle back in 14th seven points and nine places below us with a record under Ruben Amorim which hardly portrays him as their saviour.

arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up in Premier League fixture vs Newcastle
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith)
arts.sum: Man United will be looking to get back to winning ways when they host Newcastle United at Old Trafford on Monday evening.
